steps: Prepare the following stocks prior to medium assembly.
Using an acid-washed and autoclaved one Liter screw-top Pyrex bottle, combine basic salts in 997.4095 mL MilliQ-filtered water. (stock volumes subtracted)
Stocks should be added in a Biosafety cabinet or hood with appropriate ventilation. Swirl or invert media between stock additions.
Mix continuously with stir bar or invert the tightly capped bottle. Each chemical should be fully dissolved before next addition.
Add (per Liter): 10 μL Trace Metal Mix 10µL Vitamin Mix 20 µL Amino Acid Mix 50 µL Misc. Mix 500 µL Inorganic Nitrogen Mix 0.5 µL Fatty Acid Mix 1mL Iron Mix 1mL Phosphate Mix
Iron mix (1,000x) Trace Metals (100,000x) Vitamins (100,000x) AA mix (500x) Misc. mix (20,000x) Phosphate mix (1000x) Inorganic Nitrogen mix (2,000x) Fatty Acid mix (2,000,000x)
When in the biosafety cabinet or laminar fume hood filter-sterilize medium using a 0.2 µm filter into another sterilized one Liter Pyrex bottle.
pH and record. Media can be stored at room temp (~25 C°) in the tightly closed Pyrex bottle.
Filter sterilize stocks using 0.2 µM PES filter.
creator: Shelby J Barnes
